productDisplayName: Flying Machine Women Washed Blue Capris
description: Style NoteLook cool and casual in these washed blue denim capris from flying machine. The washed and frayed look gives you an individual style, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team it with a colourful tee and canvas shoes.Product DetailsLight blue denim capris with a washed look, has two insert pockets on the front, two patch pockets on the back with embroidered detailing, brand name appliqued on the waist at the back, roll over detail on the hems, belt loops on waistband and a metal zipper and button closure on the frontMaterial and Care98.4% cotton and 1.6% spandexDelicate machine wash coldDo not bleach or tumble dryHang dry in shadeWarm iron on reverseDo not iron on print or embroiderySize and FitRegualr fit, low riseThe model (height 5'8" and waist 28") is wearing a size 28
